markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

This is to inform you that tonight’s 40 Aḥadīth class (Sunday, November 29th) is CANCELLED. Sorry for the last minute’s notice.
